creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to OlivierW from comment #0)
Well, by default squid is compiled with Heimdal from base.
1. Have you installed squid from official repo? Which one, head or quarter? Or you built squid manually from ports tree
2. Did you do it on system with GENERIC kernel and what is mire important generic world? I mean did you rebuilt your world with something turned off in /etc/src.conf or /etc/make.conf?
